name: macOS Debug Menu Functionalization (Full Actions)
descriptions: Convert currently exposed macOS Debug menu actions from safe stubs into real runtime functionality while preserving crash safety, determinism, and compatibility.
success_criteria: All seven Debug menu actions perform real runtime behavior on macOS.
No menu click path can crash process.
Default app compatibility behavior remains unchanged without explicit policy changes.
Determinism signals are preserved for replay/step/export actions.
Artifact-producing actions generate valid outputs with required metadata.
E2E smoke on at least two example apps passes with reproducible artifact manifest.
Rollback switch disables functional wiring cleanly.

closeout_criteria.metric_description: R-040 full-action macOS debug menu go/no-go score.
hard_no_go_conditions: any debug action remains stub/no-op without explicit capability-disabled rationale
any menu click can crash process
determinism digest/provenance checks fail for replay/step/export
rollback kill-switch fails to disable functional wiring safely
required_commands: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --with pytest pytest tests -k "debug_screenshot or debug_recording or debug_overlay or debug_replay or debug_frame_step or debug_bundle or macos_menu_integration" -q
PYTHONPATH=. uv run python main.py run-app examples/app_protocol/planes_v2_poc --render macos --ticks 120
PYTHONPATH=. uv run python main.py run-app examples/app_protocol/input_sensor_logger --render macos --ticks 120

ci_required_checks: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --with pytest pytest tests -k "debug_screenshot or debug_recording or debug_overlay or debug_replay or debug_frame_step or debug_bundle or macos_menu_integration" -q
